subcodes.first_line: O thou who claspeth fast to the hem of the Covenant! Thy cherished letter was received and its contents were noted with care. Today [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بذیل المیثاق مکتوب مرغوب بر وجه مطلوب دقت در مضمون گردید الیوم در
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @exhortations and counsels, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @predictions and prophecies
